footer.text: Yield.co — Open source. Data: brapi.dev, BCB

home.paragraph: Yield.co is an open source screener to analyze the fundamentals of companies and real estate funds on the B3 — directly in the browser, no login, no database.

feature_1.title: Complete Screener
feature_1.description: Access fundamental data, multiples, indicators, and prices of stocks and REITs listed on the B3 — all in one place.

feature_2.title: Quick Analysis
feature_2.description: Get a quick analysis of fair price, margin of safety, and buy, sell, or neutral signals for each asset.

feature_3.title: Real-time Data
feature_3.description: Quotes and fundamentals via brapi.dev, with native Next.js caching.

stocks.title: Stocks — Valuation Ranking
stocks.subtitle: Stocks · Data updated every 10 minutes via brapi.dev

404.title: Asset or page not found
404.message: Check if the ticker is correct or go back to Home.

fiis.title: REITs — Valuation Ranking
fiis.subtitle: Real estate funds · Data updated every 10 minutes via brapi.dev
